curation_notes: Single file patch (WikiSEO.body.php). The modifyHTML function directly interpolated user-supplied $content and $property variables into HTML meta tag strings. The fix replaces raw string interpolation with Html::element() which properly escapes attribute values. No sibling files — the repository contains only one main source file. Pre-assigned xss class confirmed via CWE-79 and the patch which adds output escaping.
